architecture.name: road-incident-management-system
architecture.description: Comprehensive road incident management system for monitoring, detecting, and responding to traffic incidents on Mpumalanga Province roads with integrated safety audit capabilities

stack.database: PostgreSQL with PostGIS for geospatial data
stack.ai: Claude API integration for incident analysis and safety recommendations
stack.mapping: MapBox GL JS for road network visualization
stack.mobile: React Native for field inspector app

modules.name: incident-detection
modules.purpose: Real-time monitoring and automatic incident detection using traffic cameras, sensors, and citizen reports

modules.name: incident-management
modules.purpose: Complete incident lifecycle management from creation to resolution

modules.name: response-coordination
modules.purpose: Emergency response coordination with dispatch, resource allocation, and communication

modules.name: safety-audit
modules.purpose: Road safety audit management with inspection scheduling, reporting, and compliance tracking

modules.name: geospatial-mapping
modules.purpose: Interactive road network mapping with incident overlay and route optimization

modules.name: analytics-dashboard
modules.purpose: Real-time monitoring dashboard with KPIs, trends analysis, and reporting

modules.name: notification-system
modules.purpose: Multi-channel alert system for stakeholders including SMS, email, and push notifications

modules.name: mobile-field-app
modules.purpose: Mobile application for field inspectors and response teams

modules.name: reporting-engine
modules.purpose: Automated report generation for compliance, performance metrics, and audit trails

modules.name: integration-hub
modules.purpose: External system integrations with traffic management systems, emergency services, and government databases

apiEndpoints.description: Get incidents with filtering and pagination
Update incident status and response actions
Get provincial road network data with current conditions
Get safety audit checklist and inspection points
Submit safety audit findings and recommendations
Get real-time dashboard metrics and KPIs
Get incident trends and pattern analysis
Send emergency broadcast alerts to stakeholders
Generate compliance reports for regulatory requirements
Synchronize mobile field data with central system
Get real-time traffic data from external systems

aiChatbot.purpose: Intelligent assistant for incident analysis, safety recommendations, and operational support for traffic management personnel
capabilities: Analyze incident patterns and suggest preventive measures
Provide real-time safety audit guidance and checklists
Provide historical data insights and trend analysis
Offer training guidance for response procedures
